concerns.text: SC-007 requires a validation script to confirm tie-breaking rules are applied consistently with exit code 0. T028 and T046 only document rules in tie_breaking_rules.md, but no task exists to create the validation script.

T024 and T025 implement algorithm validation against KnotInfo in Phase 1, but FR-003 explicitly states 'Additional invariants MUST NOT be computed in Phase 1 implementation' and defers algorithm validation to Phase 2+.
T015 generates dataset_counts.md but plan.md's project structure does not include this file; SC-001 and FR-001 require validation_scope.md instead, creating a path inconsistency.

T038-T039 create a 'combined complexity metric' visualization and interpretation, but this metric is not defined in spec.md (FR-005, FR-006 only cover crossing number, braid index, hyperbolic volume as core invariants), violating Constitution Principle IV.

T038 references 'Dan Rockmore review - human readability' but the spec.md does not include this specific requirement; the task appears to address reviewer feedback not yet incorporated into the formal specification.
